modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Mostly sunny conditions with light winds expected. Maximum temperature of 20°C with an overnight minimum of 8°C. Low chance of rainfall at 20% with negligible precipitation expected.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Safety
modules.summary: Open Burning Period (Unrestricted) is currently in effect. No permit is required to light fires in the open air. Always exercise caution and verify local conditions before ignition.
bullet_points: No permit required for open-air fires today
Always verify local wind and daily weather conditions before ignition
Ensure an adult is present and extinguishing equipment is handy

modules.title: Bin Collection Schedule
modules.summary: Recyclables (Yellow bin) collection is scheduled for this week. Landfill (Red bin) collection will resume next week.
